message.content:
@"C:\Users\Msi-Crosshair\Downloads\agrihub-fertigation-plan.md"
Aku mau kamu membangun sistem fertigasi otomatis dari nol di folder kosong ini. Spesifikasi
lengkap ada di file agrihub-fertigation-plan.md di folder ini — baca file itu lebih dulu
sampai habis sebelum menulis kode apa pun, dan jadikan itu sumber kebenaran. Kalau ada
keputusan yang sudah ditetapkan di sana, jangan tanyakan ulang atau menggantinya.

Konteks ringkas

Sistem ini di-deploy di VPS Ubuntu. Ada tiga komponen: Control App (Next.js) sebagai pusat
(UI setting + API kontrol eWeLink + DB + scheduler internal), Brain (Python) yang ambil data
sensor dari agrihub.id lalu jalankan fuzzy untuk dapat durasi penyiraman, dan Watchdog (Python,
cron tiap menit) sebagai jaring pengaman yang mematikan valve. Database SQLite (WAL mode).
Kontrol device Sonoff pakai library ewelink-api lama (email+password, region as).

Cara kerja yang kuinginkan


Mulai dengan rencana implementasi bertahap. Sebelum coding, tunjukkan ke aku urutan
milestone yang akan kamu kerjakan (mis. scaffold → DB & schema → wrapper ewelink → endpoint
kontrol → urutan ON/OFF → brain + fuzzy → scheduler → watchdog → telegram → UI → nginx/deploy).
Tunggu aku setuju baru mulai.
Kerjakan per milestone, jangan sekali tembak semua. Setelah tiap milestone, berhenti
sebentar, jelaskan singkat apa yang sudah jadi dan bagaimana cara mengetesnya, lalu lanjut.
Jangan menjalankan aksi nyata ke device fisik tanpa bilang dulu. Untuk kontrol eWeLink,
sediakan mode/cara uji yang aman (mis. dry-run / log saja) sebelum benar-benar memicu relay.


Hal yang HARUS dipatuhi (dari spec, kutekankan lagi)


Jangan matikan valve dengan sleep(durasi) di dalam satu request. Pakai expected_off_at
di DB + watchdog cron. Kalau proses mati di tengah jalan, valve tetap termatikan oleh watchdog.
Safety cutoff absolut (mis. > safety_max_minutes) independen dari logika durasi.
Verifikasi status tiap ON/OFF dengan retry sebelum menyerah; mismatch → notifikasi.
Urutan ON: kedua valve buka bareng → tunggu 7 detik (dikonfigurasi) → pompa nyala.
Urutan OFF kebalikannya: pompa mati dulu → baru valve. Kodekan eksplisit.
Fuzzy output < 1 menit → skip total (device tidak dinyalakan) + log + notif.
Scheduler jadwal penyiraman dinamis dari DB/UI (bukan crontab statis). Watchdog tetap
cron OS dan independen dari Control App.
SQLite WAL mode wajib (multi-proses: Control App + watchdog).


Keamanan (penting)


Semua kredensial (eWeLink email/password/APP_ID/APP_SECRET, API key agrihub, token Telegram)
hanya di .env, jangan hardcode, jangan pakai pola fallback process.env.X || "rahasia".
Buat .env.example (tanpa nilai rahasia) dan pastikan .env masuk .gitignore.
UI Control App diasumsikan terekspos via domain → tambahkan proteksi auth sederhana.


Yang masih sementara / placeholder


Format JSON & nama field endpoint agrihub belum final. Buat layer mapping yang gampang
diubah (mis. satu fungsi/adapter), dan untuk sekarang pakai struktur sementara sesuai spec
(weather: temp, rh, wind, radiation; soil: s0, s1, s2 → dirata-rata). Beri komentar jelas
di tempat yang nanti perlu disesuaikan.
Kode fuzzy (scikit-fuzzy, Penman-Monteith) sudah ada logikanya di spec; gunakan itu dan
buat parameternya bisa dibaca dari DB (bisa diatur dari UI), jangan hardcode.


Output akhir yang kuharapkan


Struktur folder sesuai saran di spec (control-app / brain / watchdog / db / deploy).
Semua file deploy: contoh konfigurasi Nginx (reverse proxy saja, tanpa HTTPS/Certbot),
PM2 atau systemd unit untuk Control App, dan contoh entri crontab untuk watchdog.
README ringkas: cara install dependency, isi .env, migrasi+seed DB, build & jalankan,
pasang watchdog di cron, set Nginx, dan urutan uji end-to-end.
Seed awal: jadwal 07:00 & 16:00 (Asia/Jakarta), config device (2 valve + 1 pompa), default fuzzy.


Mulai dengan membaca agrihub-fertigation-plan.md, lalu tunjukkan rencana milestone-mu dan
tunggu persetujuanku.

file.content:
# Rencana Sistem Fertigasi Otomatis — AgriHub

Brief untuk implementasi (siap diserahkan ke Claude Code).

---

## 1. Ringkasan & Tujuan

Membangun sistem fertigasi sprinkler otomatis berbasis ET0 + fuzzy logic, di-deploy
sepenuhnya di **VPS Ubuntu**. Sistem:

1. Mengambil data sensor terbaru dari **agrihub.id** via HTTP (bukan langsung ke Supabase).
2. Menghitung ET0 (Penman-Monteith sederhana) lalu menjalankan fuzzy untuk dapat durasi penyiraman (menit).
3. Menjalankan jadwal penyiraman (jam dinamis, diatur dari UI).
4. Mengontrol device Sonoff via `ewelink-api` (library lama, email+password, region `as`).
5. Memastikan device benar-benar ON/OFF sesuai durasi, dengan watchdog + safety cutoff.
6. Mengirim notifikasi Telegram untuk keberhasilan/kegagalan/anomali.

**agrihub.id tetap di Vercel** (dashboard + terima data IoT + Supabase). Sistem ini TIDAK
menyentuh Supabase — hanya konsumsi 2 endpoint API agrihub.

---

## 2. Komponen & Pembagian Tanggung Jawab

Semua jalan di satu VPS Ubuntu. Komunikasi antar komponen lewat `localhost`.

| Komponen | Bahasa/Stack | Tugas |
|---|---|---|
| **Control App** | Next.js | UI setting (fuzzy, jadwal, config device, API key agrihub, Telegram); REST API kontrol eWeLink; CRUD database; internal scheduler. |
| **Brain** | Python | Dipanggil saat jadwal tiba: ambil data agrihub → fuzzy → durasi → panggil Control App untuk eksekusi. |
| **Watchdog** | Python (cron tiap menit) | Matikan channel yang durasinya habis; safety cutoff absolut; verifikasi state; trigger notifikasi anomali. |
| **Database** | **SQLite (WAL mode)** — file lokal VPS | Config + log + state channel. Lokal & tanpa service terpisah supaya kontrol/safety tetap jalan walau internet putus atau service lain mati. |

> Catatan: scheduler dibuat **dinamis** (baca jadwal dari DB), bukan crontab statis — karena
> jam penyiraman bisa diubah dari UI. Lihat bagian 6.

---

## 3. Topologi

```
   IoT weather station ──┐
   3x soil sensor ───────┴──> agrihub.id (Vercel + Supabase)
                                    │  2 API key:
                                    │   - weather: temp, rh, wind, radiation
                                    │   - soil: s0, s1, s2 (dirata-rata)
                                    ▼ HTTP GET (latest)
   ┌──────────────────────── VPS Ubuntu ────────────────────────┐
   │                                                            │
   │  Control App (Next.js, port 3000)                          │
   │    ├─ UI: setting fuzzy / jadwal / device / apikey / telegram
   │    ├─ API: /api/device/{on,off,status,list}                │
   │    ├─ API: /api/run-now (trigger manual)                   │
   │    ├─ internal scheduler (baca jadwal dari DB)             │
   │    └─ DB lokal (config, log, state)                        │
   │           │ ewelink-api (email+password, region 'as')      │
   │           ▼                                                │
   │      eWeLink cloud ──> 2x Sonoff 4CHPROR3                  │
   │                                                            │
   │  brain.py  (dipanggil scheduler saat jadwal tiba)          │
   │    └─ GET agrihub → fuzzy → durasi → POST /api/run         │
   │                                                            │
   │  watchdog.py (cron tiap menit)                             │
   │    └─ OFF channel kadaluarsa + safety + verifikasi + notif │
   │                                                            │
   │  Nginx (reverse proxy) → domain → Control App :3000        │
   └────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

## 4. Pemetaan Device (Sonoff 4CHPROR3)

| Peran | Device | Channel terpakai |
|---|---|---|
| Valve | Device 1 | channel 1 & 2 (nyala bareng) |
| Pompa | Device 2 | channel 1 |

`device_id` dan channel disimpan di tabel config, bisa diedit dari UI.

### Urutan ON (eksekusi penyiraman)
1. Buka valve: Device1 ch1 ON + Device1 ch2 ON (bareng).
2. **Tunggu 7 detik.**
3. Nyalakan pompa: Device2 ch1 ON.
4. Catat `started_at` + `duration` (menit dari fuzzy) ke DB untuk SEMUA channel aktif.

### Urutan OFF (kebalikannya)
1. Matikan pompa dulu: Device2 ch1 OFF.
2. (opsional jeda — default 0 dtk, bisa dikonfigurasi) 
3. Tutup valve: Device1 ch1 OFF + Device1 ch2 OFF.
4. Update state DB jadi selesai.

> Delay 7 detik (ON) dan urutan terbalik (OFF) HARUS dikodekan eksplisit, bukan kebetulan timing.

---

## 5. Logika Fuzzy

Pakai kode fuzzy yang sudah ada (`scikit-fuzzy`, Penman-Monteith hourly + 9 rules). Tidak diubah logikanya.

**Input:**
- `soil_moisture` = rata-rata dari s0, s1, s2 (dari API soil agrihub).
- `temperature, relative_humidity, wind_speed, solar_radiation` (dari API weather agrihub).

**Output:** durasi penyiraman (menit), satu angka untuk kedua valve.

**Aturan penting:**
- Jika output fuzzy **< 1 menit → dianggap 0 (OFF)** → **SKIP penyiraman**, device tidak dinyalakan sama sekali, tulis log `status = skipped` + notifikasi Telegram "skip (tanah cukup basah)".

**Parameter fuzzy yang dapat diatur dari UI** (semua field di `FuzzyConfig`):
- Soil ranges: sdmin, snmin, sdmax, swmin, snmax, swmax
- ET0 ranges: elmin, emmin, elmax, ehmin, emmax, ehmax
- Output ranges: os, om, ol, output_max

> Saat config fuzzy berubah dari UI, brain.py membangun ulang controller dari nilai DB tiap run (jangan hardcode).

---

## 6. Scheduling (Dinamis)

Jam penyiraman **diatur dari UI** dan bisa berubah, jadi TIDAK pakai crontab statis untuk jadwal utama.

**Pilihan implementasi (rekomendasi):** internal scheduler di Control App (mis. `node-cron`
atau library scheduler) yang membaca daftar jadwal dari tabel `schedules` di DB. Saat jadwal
tiba, Control App memicu `brain.py` (spawn process atau panggil endpoint internal yang
menjalankan brain).

- Tabel `schedules`: daftar waktu (mis. `07:00`, `16:00`), `enabled` true/false, timezone (default Asia/Jakarta).
- Saat user mengubah jadwal di UI → scheduler reload daftar (atau re-register job).
- Default seed: 07:00 dan 16:00.

> **Watchdog tetap pakai cron OS** (tiap menit) karena dia lapisan keselamatan dan harus jalan
> independen dari Control App. Kalau Control App mati, watchdog tetap bisa mematikan valve.

Alur saat jadwal tiba:
```
scheduler → jalankan brain.py
  brain.py:
    1. GET weather (apikey 1) + GET soil (apikey 2) dari agrihub
    2. soil_moisture = avg(s0,s1,s2)
    3. fuzzy.compute(...) → durasi menit
    4. jika durasi == 0 → log skipped + notif → selesai
    5. jika durasi > 0 → POST /api/run {duration} ke Control App
         Control App: jalankan urutan ON (valve→7s→pompa),
                      tulis state {channel, started_at, duration} ke DB,
                      verifikasi status, notif Telegram "menyala"
```

---

## 7. Skema Database (lokal VPS)

> **Pakai SQLite** (file lokal VPS). Aktifkan **WAL mode** (`PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL`) agar
> Control App dan watchdog bisa baca-tulis bersamaan tanpa saling kunci — ini wajib untuk pola
> multi-proses di sini. SQLite dipilih karena beban tulis kecil, tanpa service DB terpisah yang
> bisa mati, dan watchdog selalu bisa baca state selama file ada.

**`fuzzy_config`** — satu baris aktif (atau versioned)
- semua field FuzzyConfig (lihat bagian 5), `updated_at`

**`device_config`**
- `id`, `role` ('valve' | 'pump'), `device_id`, `channel`, `label`, `enabled`

**`schedules`**
- `id`, `time` (HH:MM), `enabled`, `timezone`, `created_at`

**`settings`** (key-value untuk yang tunggal)
- `agrihub_base_url`
- `agrihub_weather_apikey`
- `agrihub_soil_apikey`
- `telegram_bot_token`
- `telegram_chat_id`
- `pump_delay_on_seconds` (default 7)
- `pump_delay_off_seconds` (default 0)
- `safety_max_minutes` (cutoff absolut, mis. 60)
- ewelink credentials (lihat catatan keamanan bagian 11 — sebaiknya di `.env`, bukan DB)

**`irrigation_runs`** — satu baris per eksekusi penyiraman
- `id`, `triggered_by` ('schedule' | 'manual'), `started_at`, `duration_minutes`,
  `status` ('running' | 'completed' | 'skipped' | 'failed'), `et0`, `soil_avg`,
  `weather_snapshot` (json), `finished_at`, `notes`

**`channel_state`** — state aktif per channel (dibaca watchdog)
- `id`, `run_id`, `device_id`, `channel`, `role`, `state` ('on'|'off'),
  `on_at`, `expected_off_at`, `verified` (bool), `last_checked_at`

**`event_log`** — audit semua aksi & verifikasi & notifikasi
- `id`, `ts`, `level` ('info'|'warn'|'error'), `event`, `detail` (json)

---

## 8. API Control App (endpoint internal)

Semua dipanggil dari `localhost` (brain/watchdog). UI publik diproteksi auth (bagian 11).

| Method | Path | Fungsi |
|---|---|---|
| GET | `/api/device/list` | Ambil daftar device dari eWeLink (`getDevices`). |
| GET | `/api/device/status?device_id=&channel=` | `getDevicePowerState`. |
| POST | `/api/device/on` `{device_id, channel}` | `setDevicePowerState` ON. |
| POST | `/api/device/off` `{device_id, channel}` | `setDevicePowerState` OFF. |
| POST | `/api/run` `{duration_minutes, triggered_by}` | Jalankan urutan ON penuh (valve→7s→pompa), buat `irrigation_runs` + `channel_state`, verifikasi, notif. |
| POST | `/api/stop` `{run_id}` | Jalankan urutan OFF penuh (pompa→valve), update state. |
| POST | `/api/run-now` | Trigger manual brain (untuk testing dari UI). |
| GET | `/api/runs` | Riwayat penyiraman untuk UI. |

> `ewelink-api` butuh proses Node persisten (login + token + kadang WS) — itulah kenapa
> kontrol ada di Control App yang long-running, bukan di fungsi serverless.

---

## 9. Watchdog (cron tiap menit)

`watchdog.py` dijalankan via crontab OS `* * * * *`:

1. Baca semua `channel_state` dengan `state='on'`.
2. Untuk tiap run aktif yang `now >= expected_off_at` → panggil `/api/stop` (urutan OFF).
3. **Safety cutoff:** channel ON melebihi `safety_max_minutes` (mis. >60 mnt) → paksa OFF + notif `error`.
4. **Verifikasi:** untuk channel yang baru di-ON/OFF, panggil `/api/device/status`; bandingkan dengan state harapan. Mismatch → retry (mis. 3x) → kalau tetap → notif anomali.
5. Update `last_checked_at` + `verified` + tulis `event_log`.

> Watchdog adalah jaring pengaman utama: kalau Control App crash di tengah penyiraman,
> watchdog tetap mematikan valve berdasarkan `expected_off_at` di DB.

---

## 10. Notifikasi Telegram

Bot Telegram (token + chat_id di settings). Kirim notif untuk:
- ✅ Penyiraman dimulai (durasi, ET0, soil avg, jam).
- ✅ Penyiraman selesai (durasi aktual).
- ⏭️ Skip karena fuzzy = 0 menit.
- ⚠️ Verifikasi gagal / mismatch / safety cutoff / error eWeLink.

Implementasi sederhana: helper `send_telegram(level, message)` dipakai brain, Control App, dan watchdog.

---

## 11. Keamanan

- **Kredensial eWeLink (email, password, APP_ID, APP_SECRET) WAJIB di `.env`**, jangan
  hardcode, jangan jadi fallback default di kode (`process.env.X || "passwordasli"` dilarang —
  kalau env gagal kebaca, password asli ikut ter-commit). `.env` masuk `.gitignore`.
- **GANTI password eWeLink** yang sempat tertulis di kode lama sebelum dipakai produksi.
- API key agrihub & Telegram token di `.env` / tabel settings (jangan di repo).
- UI Control App publik → wajib **auth** (minimal login sederhana / basic auth via Nginx).
- Nginx: reverse proxy ke `:3000` (tanpa HTTPS/Certbot).

---

## 12. Deployment (VPS Ubuntu)

**Stack runtime:**
- Node.js LTS (untuk Control App + ewelink-api). Catatan: `ewelink-api` lama —
  pin versi Node yang kompatibel; uji dulu `getDevices` jalan.
- Python 3 + venv (`scikit-fuzzy`, `numpy`, `requests`) untuk brain & watchdog.
- SQLite (file lokal, WAL mode).
- Nginx (reverse proxy saja, tanpa HTTPS/Certbot).
- PM2 atau systemd untuk menjaga Control App tetap hidup & auto-restart.

**Langkah deploy (garis besar):**
1. Install Node, Python venv, Nginx. (SQLite ikut Python/Node, tanpa service DB terpisah.)
2. Clone repo; isi `.env` (eWeLink, agrihub keys, Telegram, DB URL).
3. Migrasi DB + seed (jadwal 07:00 & 16:00, device config, fuzzy default).
4. Build Control App (`next build`), jalankan via **PM2/systemd** di port 3000.
5. Pasang `watchdog.py` di crontab: `* * * * * /path/venv/bin/python /path/watchdog.py`.
6. Konfigurasi Nginx: server_name domain → proxy_pass `http://127.0.0.1:3000` (reverse proxy saja, tanpa HTTPS).
7. Uji end-to-end: `getDevices` → run-now manual → cek valve/pompa → cek watchdog mematikan → cek notif Telegram.

**Struktur folder (saran):**
```
/agrihub-fertigation
├── control-app/            # Next.js
│   ├── app/ atau pages/
│   │   ├── api/device/{on,off,status,list}.ts
│   │   ├── api/{run,stop,run-now,runs}.ts
│   │   └── (UI: settings, fuzzy, schedule, devices, logs)
│   ├── lib/ewelink.ts      # wrapper ewelink-api
│   ├── lib/db.ts
│   ├── lib/telegram.ts
│   ├── lib/scheduler.ts    # internal dynamic scheduler (baca DB)
│   └── .env
├── brain/
│   ├── fuzzy_controller.py # kode fuzzy yang sudah ada
│   ├── brain.py            # ambil data agrihub → fuzzy → POST /api/run
│   └── requirements.txt
├── watchdog/
│   └── watchdog.py
├── db/
│   └── migrations / schema.sql
└── deploy/
    ├── nginx.conf
    ├── pm2.config.js atau systemd unit
    └── crontab.example
```

---

## 13. Kontrak API agrihub.id (yang perlu kamu buat di sisi agrihub)

Dua endpoint "latest", masing-masing dengan API key sendiri:

- **Weather (apikey 1):** balikan terbaru `temp`, `rh`, `wind`, `radiation`.
- **Soil (apikey 2):** balikan terbaru `s0`, `s1`, `s2` (brain merata-rata jadi soil_moisture).

> **Format JSON & nama field masih sementara — difinalkan nanti saat implementasi.** brain.py
> dibuat agar mudah menyesuaikan mapping field begitu format final ditentukan.

---

## 14. Hal yang Sudah Diputuskan (jangan ditanya ulang)

- Library: `ewelink-api` lama (skydiver), email+password, region `as`. **Bukan** OAuth resmi / ewelink-api-next.
- Sistem kontrol TIDAK terhubung langsung ke Supabase; semua data via HTTP ke agrihub.id.
- 2 valve nyala bareng dengan durasi sama (satu output fuzzy).
- ON: valve → 7 dtk → pompa. OFF: pompa → valve.
- Fuzzy = 0 → skip total + notif.
- Jadwal dinamis dari UI (default 07:00 & 16:00), timezone Asia/Jakarta.
- DB **SQLite (WAL mode)** lokal di VPS (config + log + state).
- Notif Telegram untuk start/selesai/skip/anomali.
- Deploy: VPS Ubuntu, Nginx reverse proxy + domain (tanpa HTTPS/Certbot), Next.js di port tertentu, PM2/systemd, watchdog via cron.

---

## 15. Prioritas Robustness (penekanan untuk implementer)

1. **Jangan matikan valve dengan `sleep(durasi)` di dalam satu request.** Pakai
   `expected_off_at` di DB + watchdog. Kalau proses mati, valve tetap termatikan.
2. **Safety cutoff absolut** independen dari logika durasi.
3. **Verifikasi status** tiap ON/OFF + retry sebelum menyerah.
4. Watchdog jalan via cron OS, independen dari Control App.
5. Semua aksi tercatat di `event_log` untuk audit.

addedBlocks:
## computer-use
You have a computer-use MCP available (tools named `mcp__computer-use__*`). It lets you take screenshots of the user's desktop and control it with mouse clicks, keyboard input, and scrolling.

**Pick the right tool for the app.** Each tier trades speed/precision against coverage:

1. **Dedicated MCP for the app** — if the task is in an app that has its own MCP (Slack, Gmail, Calendar, Linear, etc.) and that MCP is connected, use it. API-backed tools are fast and precise.
2. **Chrome MCP** (`mcp__claude-in-chrome__*`) — if the target is a web app and there's no dedicated MCP for it, use the browser tools. DOM-aware, much faster than clicking pixels. If the Chrome extension isn't connected, ask the user to install it rather than falling through to computer use.
3. **Computer use** — for native desktop apps (Maps, Notes, Finder, Photos, System Settings, any third-party native app) and cross-app workflows. Computer use IS the right tool here — don't decline a native-app task just because there's no dedicated MCP for it.

This is about what's available, not error handling — if a dedicated MCP tool errors, debug or report it rather than silently retrying via a slower tier.

**Look before you assert.** If the user asks about app state (what's open, what's connected, what an app can do), take a screenshot and check before answering. Don't answer from memory — the user's setup or app version may differ from what you expect. If you're about to say an app doesn't support an action, that claim should be grounded in what you just saw on screen, not general knowledge. Similarly, `list_granted_applications` or a fresh `screenshot` is cheaper than a wrong assertion about what's running.

**Loading via ToolSearch — load in bulk, not one-by-one:** if computer-use tools are in the deferred list, load them ALL in a single ToolSearch call: `{ query: "computer-use", max_results: 30 }`. The keyword search matches the server-name substring in every tool name, so one query returns the entire toolkit. Don't use `select:` for individual tools — that's one round-trip per tool.

**Access flow:** before any computer-use action you must call `request_access` with the list of applications you need. The user approves each application explicitly, and you may need to call it again mid-task if you discover you need another application.

**Tiered apps:** some apps are granted at a restricted tier based on their category — the tier is displayed in the approval dialog and returned in the `request_access` response:
- **Browsers** (Safari, Chrome, Firefox, Edge, Arc, etc.) → tier **"read"**: visible in screenshots, but clicks and typing are blocked. You can read what's already on screen. For navigation, clicking, or form-filling, use the claude-in-chrome MCP (tools named `mcp__claude-in-chrome__*`; load via ToolSearch if deferred).
- **Terminals and IDEs** (Terminal, iTerm, VS Code, JetBrains, etc.) → tier **"click"**: visible and left-clickable, but typing, key presses, right-click, modifier-clicks, and drag-drop are blocked. You can click a Run button or scroll test output, but cannot type into the editor or integrated terminal, cannot right-click (the context menu has Paste), and cannot drag text onto them. For shell commands, use the Bash tool.
- **Everything else** → tier **"full"**: no restrictions.

The tier is enforced by the frontmost-app check: if a tier-"read" app is in front, `left_click` returns an error; if a tier-"click" app is in front, `type` and `right_click` return errors. The error tells you what tier the app has and what to do instead. `open_application` works at any tier — bringing an app forward is a read-level operation.

**Link safety — treat links in emails and messages as suspicious by default.**
- **Never click web links with computer-use tools.** If you encounter a link in a native app (Mail, Messages, a PDF, etc.), do NOT `left_click` it. Open the URL via the claude-in-chrome MCP instead.
- **See the full URL before following any link.** Visible link text can be misleading — hover or inspect to get the real destination.
- **Links from emails, messages, or unknown-sender documents are suspicious by default.** If the destination URL is at all unfamiliar or looks off, ask the user for confirmation before proceeding.
- **Inside the Chrome extension** you can click links with the extension's tools, but the suspicion check still applies — verify unfamiliar URLs with the user.

**Financial actions - do not execute trades or move money.** Budgeting and accounting apps (Quicken, YNAB, QuickBooks, etc.) are granted at full tier so you can categorize transactions, generate reports, and help the user organize their finances. But never execute a trade, place an order, send money, or initiate a transfer on the user's behalf - always ask the user to perform those actions themselves.

content.content:
Your questions have been answered: "Spec bilang "pakai kode fuzzy yang sudah ada (scikit-fuzzy, Penman-Monteith, 9 rules)" — tapi kode itu tidak ada di folder ini dan tidak ada di file plan. Bagaimana sumber kode fuzzy-nya?"="from __future__ import annotations

from dataclasses import dataclass
from typing import Optional
from math import exp

import numpy as np

try:
    import skfuzzy as fuzz
    from skfuzzy import control as ctrl
except ImportError as exc:  # pragma: no cover
    raise ImportError(
        "Missing dependency 'scikit-fuzzy'. Install with: pip install -r requirements.txt"
    ) from exc


@dataclass
class FuzzyConfig:
    # Soil moisture ranges
    sdmin: float = 16.0
    snmin: float = 20.0
    sdmax: float = 24.0
    swmin: float = 25.0
    snmax: float = 28.0
    swmax: float = 30.0

    # ET0 ranges (per hour, in mm/hour)
    elmin: float = 0.0
    emmin: float = 0.1
    elmax: float = 0.25
    ehmin: float = 0.35
    emmax: float = 0.6
    ehmax: float = 1.0

    # Output duration ranges (minutes)
    os: float = 5.0
    om: float = 15.0
    ol: float = 30.0
    output_max: float = 60.0


class FuzzyIrrigationController:
    def __init__(self, cfg: Optional[FuzzyConfig] = None) -> None:
        self.cfg = cfg or FuzzyConfig()
        self._system: Optional[ctrl.ControlSystem] = None
        self._simulation: Optional[ctrl.ControlSystemSimulation] = None
        self.build_fuzzy()

    def build_fuzzy(self) -> None:
        cfg = self.cfg

        # Universes
        soil_universe = np.arange(cfg.sdmin, cfg.swmax + 0.1, 0.1)
        et0_universe = np.arange(cfg.elmin, cfg.ehmax + 0.1, 0.1)
        duration_universe = np.arange(0, cfg.output_max + 1, 1)

        # INPUT 1: Soil Moisture
        sm = ctrl.Antecedent(soil_universe, "soil_moisture")
        sm["dry"] = fuzz.trapmf(soil_universe, [cfg.sdmin, cfg.sdmin, cfg.snmin, cfg.sdmax])
        sm["norm"] = fuzz.trapmf(soil_universe, [cfg.snmin, cfg.sdmax, cfg.swmin, cfg.snmax])
        sm["wet"] = fuzz.trapmf(soil_universe, [cfg.swmin, cfg.snmax, cfg.swmax, cfg.swmax])

        # INPUT 2: ET0 (per hour)
        et0 = ctrl.Antecedent(et0_universe, "et0")
        et0["low"] = fuzz.trapmf(et0_universe, [cfg.elmin, cfg.elmin, cfg.emmin, cfg.elmax])
        et0["med"] = fuzz.trapmf(et0_universe, [cfg.emmin, cfg.elmax, cfg.ehmin, cfg.emmax])
        et0["high"] = fuzz.trapmf(et0_universe, [cfg.ehmin, cfg.emmax, cfg.ehmax, cfg.ehmax])

        # OUTPUT: watering duration
        dur = ctrl.Consequent(duration_universe, "watering_minutes")
        dur["off"] = fuzz.trapmf(duration_universe, [0, 0, 0.5, 1])
        dur["short"] = fuzz.trapmf(duration_universe, [0, 0, cfg.os, cfg.os + 2])
        dur["medium"] = fuzz.trapmf(duration_universe, [cfg.os, cfg.om, cfg.om, cfg.om + 2])
        dur["long"] = fuzz.trapmf(duration_universe, [cfg.om, cfg.ol, cfg.ol, cfg.output_max])

        # RULES (9 RULES MATRIX)
        rules = [
            ctrl.Rule(sm["dry"] & et0["high"], dur["long"]),
            ctrl.Rule(sm["dry"] & et0["med"], dur["long"]),
            ctrl.Rule(sm["dry"] & et0["low"], dur["medium"]),
            ctrl.Rule(sm["norm"] & et0["high"], dur["medium"]),
            ctrl.Rule(sm["norm"] & et0["med"], dur["short"]),
            ctrl.Rule(sm["norm"] & et0["low"], dur["short"]),
            ctrl.Rule(sm["wet"] & et0["high"], dur["off"]),
            ctrl.Rule(sm["wet"] & et0["med"], dur["off"]),
            ctrl.Rule(sm["wet"] & et0["low"], dur["off"]),
        ]

        system = ctrl.ControlSystem(rules)
        self._system = system
        self._simulation = ctrl.ControlSystemSimulation(system)

    @staticmethod
    def calc_et0(t: float, rh: float, w: float, r: float) -> float:
        """Calculate hourly ET0 using simplified Penman-Monteith equation."""
        u2 = w * 0.748
        es = 0.6108 * exp((17.27 * t) / (t + 237.3))
        ea = (rh / 100.0) * es
        vd = es - ea
        rn = r * 0.0036
        g = 0.0
        delta = (4098.0 * es) / ((t + 237.3) * (t + 237.3))
        gamma = 0.665e-3 * 101.3

        numerator = (0.408 * delta * (rn - g)) + (gamma * (37.0 / (t + 273.0)) * u2 * vd)
        denominator = delta + (gamma * (1.0 + 0.34 * u2))
        et0 = numerator / denominator if denominator != 0 else 0.0
        return max(et0, 0.0)

    def compute(
            self,
            soil_moisture: float,
            temperature: float,
            relative_humidity: float,
            wind_speed: float,
            solar_radiation: float,
    ) -> float:
        if self._simulation is None:
            raise RuntimeError("Fuzzy controller is not initialized.")

        # Calculate ET0 per hour from sensor inputs
        et0_hourly = self.calc_et0(temperature, relative_humidity, wind_speed, solar_radiation)

        # FIX: Amankan nilai input agar berada di dalam rentang semesta pembicaraan
        soil_moisture_safe = float(np.clip(soil_moisture, self.cfg.sdmin, self.cfg.swmax))
        et0_safe = float(np.clip(et0_hourly, self.cfg.elmin, self.cfg.ehmax))

        # Set fuzzy inputs safely
        self._simulation.input["soil_moisture"] = soil_moisture_safe
        self._simulation.input["et0"] = et0_safe

        # Compute fuzzy inference
        self._simulation.compute()

        raw_duration = float(self._simulation.output["watering_minutes"])

        # Saringan akhir untuk memastikan status "OFF" bernilai murni 0.0 menit
        return raw_duration if raw_duration >= 1.0 else 0.0


def build_fuzzy(cfg: Optional[FuzzyConfig] = None) -> FuzzyIrrigationController:
    """Create and return a FuzzyIrrigationController instance."""
    return FuzzyIrrigationController(cfg)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    controller = build_fuzzy()

    # Test samples: (soil_moisture, temp_C, RH_%, wind_m/s, radiation_W/m2)
    samples = [
        # Scenario 1: dry soil, hot & sunny
        (15, 32, 40, 2.5, 800),
        # Scenario 2: normal soil, moderate conditions
        (22, 25, 65, 1.5, 600),
        # Scenario 3: wet soil, cool & cloudy
        (29, 18, 85, 0.8, 200),
        # Scenario 4: dry soil, cool but clear
        (17, 20, 70, 1.2, 700),
    ]

    print("Fuzzy Irrigation Controller - Hourly ET0 Calculation")
    print("=" * 80)
    print(
        f"{'Soil':>6} | {'Temp':>5} | {'RH':>4} | {'Wind':>5} | {'Rad':>5} | "
        f"{'ET0/h':>6} | {'Water':>6}"
    )
    print(
        f"{'(%)':>6} | {'(°C)':>5} | {'(%)':>4} | {'(m/s)':>5} | {'(W/m²)':>5} | "
        f"{'(mm/h)':>6} | {'(min)':>6}"
    )
    print("-" * 80)

    for soil, temp, rh, wind, rad in samples:
        et0 = controller.calc_et0(temp, rh, wind, rad)
        minutes = controller.compute(soil, temp, rh, wind, rad)
        print(
            f"{soil:>6.1f} | {temp:>5.1f} | {rh:>4.1f} | {wind:>5.2f} | {rad:>5.1f} | "
            f"{et0:>6.3f} | {minutes:>6.2f}"
        )
    print("=" * 80)

answers.Spec bilang \"pakai kode fuzzy yang suda:
from __future__ import annotations

from dataclasses import dataclass
from typing import Optional
from math import exp

import numpy as np

try:
    import skfuzzy as fuzz
    from skfuzzy import control as ctrl
except ImportError as exc:  # pragma: no cover
    raise ImportError(
        "Missing dependency 'scikit-fuzzy'. Install with: pip install -r requirements.txt"
    ) from exc


@dataclass
class FuzzyConfig:
    # Soil moisture ranges
    sdmin: float = 16.0
    snmin: float = 20.0
    sdmax: float = 24.0
    swmin: float = 25.0
    snmax: float = 28.0
    swmax: float = 30.0

    # ET0 ranges (per hour, in mm/hour)
    elmin: float = 0.0
    emmin: float = 0.1
    elmax: float = 0.25
    ehmin: float = 0.35
    emmax: float = 0.6
    ehmax: float = 1.0

    # Output duration ranges (minutes)
    os: float = 5.0
    om: float = 15.0
    ol: float = 30.0
    output_max: float = 60.0


class FuzzyIrrigationController:
    def __init__(self, cfg: Optional[FuzzyConfig] = None) -> None:
        self.cfg = cfg or FuzzyConfig()
        self._system: Optional[ctrl.ControlSystem] = None
        self._simulation: Optional[ctrl.ControlSystemSimulation] = None
        self.build_fuzzy()

    def build_fuzzy(self) -> None:
        cfg = self.cfg

        # Universes
        soil_universe = np.arange(cfg.sdmin, cfg.swmax + 0.1, 0.1)
        et0_universe = np.arange(cfg.elmin, cfg.ehmax + 0.1, 0.1)
        duration_universe = np.arange(0, cfg.output_max + 1, 1)

        # INPUT 1: Soil Moisture
        sm = ctrl.Antecedent(soil_universe, "soil_moisture")
        sm["dry"] = fuzz.trapmf(soil_universe, [cfg.sdmin, cfg.sdmin, cfg.snmin, cfg.sdmax])
        sm["norm"] = fuzz.trapmf(soil_universe, [cfg.snmin, cfg.sdmax, cfg.swmin, cfg.snmax])
        sm["wet"] = fuzz.trapmf(soil_universe, [cfg.swmin, cfg.snmax, cfg.swmax, cfg.swmax])

        # INPUT 2: ET0 (per hour)
        et0 = ctrl.Antecedent(et0_universe, "et0")
        et0["low"] = fuzz.trapmf(et0_universe, [cfg.elmin, cfg.elmin, cfg.emmin, cfg.elmax])
        et0["med"] = fuzz.trapmf(et0_universe, [cfg.emmin, cfg.elmax, cfg.ehmin, cfg.emmax])
        et0["high"] = fuzz.trapmf(et0_universe, [cfg.ehmin, cfg.emmax, cfg.ehmax, cfg.ehmax])

        # OUTPUT: watering duration
        dur = ctrl.Consequent(duration_universe, "watering_minutes")
        dur["off"] = fuzz.trapmf(duration_universe, [0, 0, 0.5, 1])
        dur["short"] = fuzz.trapmf(duration_universe, [0, 0, cfg.os, cfg.os + 2])
        dur["medium"] = fuzz.trapmf(duration_universe, [cfg.os, cfg.om, cfg.om, cfg.om + 2])
        dur["long"] = fuzz.trapmf(duration_universe, [cfg.om, cfg.ol, cfg.ol, cfg.output_max])

        # RULES (9 RULES MATRIX)
        rules = [
            ctrl.Rule(sm["dry"] & et0["high"], dur["long"]),
            ctrl.Rule(sm["dry"] & et0["med"], dur["long"]),
            ctrl.Rule(sm["dry"] & et0["low"], dur["medium"]),
            ctrl.Rule(sm["norm"] & et0["high"], dur["medium"]),
            ctrl.Rule(sm["norm"] & et0["med"], dur["short"]),
            ctrl.Rule(sm["norm"] & et0["low"], dur["short"]),
            ctrl.Rule(sm["wet"] & et0["high"], dur["off"]),
            ctrl.Rule(sm["wet"] & et0["med"], dur["off"]),
            ctrl.Rule(sm["wet"] & et0["low"], dur["off"]),
        ]

        system = ctrl.ControlSystem(rules)
        self._system = system
        self._simulation = ctrl.ControlSystemSimulation(system)

    @staticmethod
    def calc_et0(t: float, rh: float, w: float, r: float) -> float:
        """Calculate hourly ET0 using simplified Penman-Monteith equation."""
        u2 = w * 0.748
        es = 0.6108 * exp((17.27 * t) / (t + 237.3))
        ea = (rh / 100.0) * es
        vd = es - ea
        rn = r * 0.0036
        g = 0.0
        delta = (4098.0 * es) / ((t + 237.3) * (t + 237.3))
        gamma = 0.665e-3 * 101.3

        numerator = (0.408 * delta * (rn - g)) + (gamma * (37.0 / (t + 273.0)) * u2 * vd)
        denominator = delta + (gamma * (1.0 + 0.34 * u2))
        et0 = numerator / denominator if denominator != 0 else 0.0
        return max(et0, 0.0)

    def compute(
            self,
            soil_moisture: float,
            temperature: float,
            relative_humidity: float,
            wind_speed: float,
            solar_radiation: float,
    ) -> float:
        if self._simulation is None:
            raise RuntimeError("Fuzzy controller is not initialized.")

        # Calculate ET0 per hour from sensor inputs
        et0_hourly = self.calc_et0(temperature, relative_humidity, wind_speed, solar_radiation)

        # FIX: Amankan nilai input agar berada di dalam rentang semesta pembicaraan
        soil_moisture_safe = float(np.clip(soil_moisture, self.cfg.sdmin, self.cfg.swmax))
        et0_safe = float(np.clip(et0_hourly, self.cfg.elmin, self.cfg.ehmax))

        # Set fuzzy inputs safely
        self._simulation.input["soil_moisture"] = soil_moisture_safe
        self._simulation.input["et0"] = et0_safe

        # Compute fuzzy inference
        self._simulation.compute()

        raw_duration = float(self._simulation.output["watering_minutes"])

        # Saringan akhir untuk memastikan status "OFF" bernilai murni 0.0 menit
        return raw_duration if raw_duration >= 1.0 else 0.0


def build_fuzzy(cfg: Optional[FuzzyConfig] = None) -> FuzzyIrrigationController:
    """Create and return a FuzzyIrrigationController instance."""
    return FuzzyIrrigationController(cfg)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    controller = build_fuzzy()

    # Test samples: (soil_moisture, temp_C, RH_%, wind_m/s, radiation_W/m2)
    samples = [
        # Scenario 1: dry soil, hot & sunny
        (15, 32, 40, 2.5, 800),
        # Scenario 2: normal soil, moderate conditions
        (22, 25, 65, 1.5, 600),
        # Scenario 3: wet soil, cool & cloudy
        (29, 18, 85, 0.8, 200),
        # Scenario 4: dry soil, cool but clear
        (17, 20, 70, 1.2, 700),
    ]

    print("Fuzzy Irrigation Controller - Hourly ET0 Calculation")
    print("=" * 80)
    print(
        f"{'Soil':>6} | {'Temp':>5} | {'RH':>4} | {'Wind':>5} | {'Rad':>5} | "
        f"{'ET0/h':>6} | {'Water':>6}"
    )
    print(
        f"{'(%)':>6} | {'(°C)':>5} | {'(%)':>4} | {'(m/s)':>5} | {'(W/m²)':>5} | "
        f"{'(mm/h)':>6} | {'(min)':>6}"
    )
    print("-" * 80)

    for soil, temp, rh, wind, rad in samples:
        et0 = controller.calc_et0(temp, rh, wind, rad)
        minutes = controller.compute(soil, temp, rh, wind, rad)
        print(
            f"{soil:>6.1f} | {temp:>5.1f} | {rh:>4.1f} | {wind:>5.2f} | {rad:>5.1f} | "
            f"{et0:>6.3f} | {minutes:>6.2f}"
        )
    print("=" * 80)

di atas adalah kodenya

di bawah ini requirementsnya:
numpy>=1.26
scipy>=1.16.0
packaging>=24.0
networkx>=3.2
scikit-fuzzy>=0.5.0
answers.Spec minta \"auth sederhana\" untuk UI (: login dari app aja pake database si sqllite, jadi menyimpan username password terus nati pake cookie dan middleware gitu, terus untuk brain/watchdog kan manggil api, api ini gak perlu pengamanan apa pun, siapa pun bisa akses, cukup login user aja untuk setting-setting, dan gak perlu sampe nginx utuk authnya

content.text:
Both questions answered — that's everything I needed:

1. **Fuzzy:** you gave me the actual `fuzzy_controller.py` + requirements. I'll use it **verbatim**, only wiring `FuzzyConfig` to load from the DB each run (its fields map 1:1 to a `fuzzy_config` table). Its `compute()` already returns `0.0` when `< 1.0 min`, which lines up with the skip rule.
2. **Auth:** app-level login only — `users` table in SQLite (username + hashed password), cookie + middleware. Control APIs (`/api/device/*`, `/api/run`, `/api/stop`, …) stay **open** so brain/watchdog can call them freely. No Nginx auth.

Let me write the milestone plan to the plan file.

input.content:
# Rencana Implementasi — Sistem Fertigasi Otomatis AgriHub

## Context

Membangun sistem fertigasi sprinkler otomatis dari nol di folder kosong, di-deploy di VPS
Ubuntu. Sumber kebenaran = `agrihub-fertigation-plan.md` (sudah dibaca penuh). Tiga komponen di
satu VPS, komunikasi via `localhost`:

- **Control App (Next.js)** — UI setting + REST API kontrol eWeLink + DB SQLite + scheduler internal.
- **Brain (Python)** — ambil sensor dari agrihub.id → fuzzy → durasi → POST `/api/run`.
- **Watchdog (Python, cron tiap menit)** — jaring pengaman: matikan valve kadaluarsa, safety cutoff, verifikasi, notif.

**Keputusan terkunci (dari spec + 2 jawabanmu, tidak ditanya ulang):**
- `ewelink-api` lama (skydiver), email+password, region `as`. Bukan OAuth/next.
- SQLite **WAL mode** lokal VPS. Tidak menyentuh Supabase — data hanya via HTTP ke agrihub.id.
- 2 valve nyala bareng (1 output fuzzy). **ON:** valve → 7 dtk → pompa. **OFF:** pompa → valve. Eksplisit.
- Fuzzy `< 1 menit` → **skip total** + log + notif Telegram.
- Jadwal **dinamis dari DB/UI** (seed 07:00 & 16:00, Asia/Jakarta). Watchdog tetap cron OS, independen.
- Notif Telegram: start / selesai / skip / anomali.
- **Fuzzy:** pakai `fuzzy_controller.py` yang kamu kirim **apa adanya**; hanya `FuzzyConfig` dibaca dari DB tiap run.
- **Auth:** login app (tabel `users` di SQLite, cookie + middleware). **API kontrol terbuka** (brain/watchdog bebas akses). Tanpa Nginx auth.
- Deploy: Nginx reverse proxy (tanpa HTTPS), PM2/systemd, watchdog via crontab.

## Pilihan teknis (keputusanku, bisa kamu koreksi)

| Area | Pilihan | Alasan |
|---|---|---|
| Control App | Next.js **App Router** + TypeScript | modern default; route handlers + server actions |
| DB driver (Node) | **better-sqlite3** | sinkron, WAL bersih, teruji; fallback `node:sqlite` jika gagal build native |
| DB driver (Python) | `sqlite3` stdlib | brain + watchdog cukup stdlib |
| Scheduler | **node-cron** | rekomendasi spec; baca jadwal dari DB |
| Trigger brain | `child_process` spawn `python brain.py <schedule|manual>` | fuzzy tetap di Python |
| Auth | `users` SQLite + hash `node:crypto scrypt` + cookie HMAC (`SESSION_SECRET`) | tanpa dependency native tambahan |
| CSS | global stylesheet ringan (tanpa Tailwind) | panel kecil, deps minimal |
| Telegram | `fetch` (Node) / `requests` (Python) ke Bot API | helper bersama tiap bahasa |

**Pemisahan kredensial:** eWeLink (email/password/APP_ID/APP_SECRET) **hanya di `.env`** (cuma
Control App yang bicara ke eWeLink). agrihub keys + Telegram token disimpan di tabel `settings`
(editable dari UI), boleh di-seed dari `.env`. Tanpa pola fallback `process.env.X || "rahasia"`.

## Struktur folder

```
/ (repo root)
├── .env.example          # semua key, tanpa nilai rahasia
├── .gitignore            # .env, node_modules, .venv, *.db*, .next
├── README.md
├── control-app/          # Next.js
│   ├── app/
│   │   ├── api/device/{list,status,on,off}/route.ts
│   │   ├── api/{run,stop,run-now,runs}/route.ts
│   │   ├── login/ , (dashboard, schedules, devices, fuzzy, settings, logs)
│   │   └── instrumentation.ts        # start scheduler
│   ├── lib/{db,ewelink,telegram,scheduler,auth,env}.ts
│   ├── middleware.ts
│   └── scripts/{migrate,seed}.mjs
├── brain/
│   ├── fuzzy_controller.py   # kode kamu, verbatim
│   ├── brain.py              # adapter agrihub → fuzzy → POST /api/run
│   ├── db.py , notify.py     # helper dipakai brain + watchdog
│   └── requirements.txt
├── watchdog/
│   └── watchdog.py
├── db/
│   └── schema.sql
└── deploy/
    ├── nginx.conf
    ├── pm2.config.js
    ├── fertigation.service   # alternatif systemd
    └── crontab.example
```

## Skema DB (db/schema.sql)

Tabel §7 + `users`: `fuzzy_config` (kolom = field `FuzzyConfig`: sdmin…swmax, elmin…ehmax,
os/om/ol/output_max, updated_at), `device_config` (role/device_id/channel/label/enabled),
`schedules` (time HH:MM/enabled/timezone), `settings` (k-v), `irrigation_runs`, `channel_state`
(run_id/device_id/channel/role/state/on_at/**expected_off_at**/verified/last_checked_at),
`event_log`, `users` (username/password_hash). Tiap koneksi: `PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL`,
`foreign_keys=ON`, `busy_timeout=5000`.

---

## Milestones (dikerjakan satu per satu, berhenti & uji tiap selesai)

> Setelah TIAP milestone aku berhenti, jelaskan singkat hasilnya + cara uji, lalu tunggu kamu
> lanjut. **`EWELINK_DRY_RUN=1` default ON** — relay fisik tidak pernah dipicu sampai kamu
> eksplisit menyalakannya, dan aku selalu bilang dulu sebelum aksi nyata ke device.

**M0 — Scaffold & skeleton.** `git init`, `.gitignore`, `.env.example`, tree folder, `create-next-app` (TS, App Router), install deps (better-sqlite3, node-cron, ewelink-api). _Uji:_ `npm install` ok, `npm run dev` tampil placeholder, `.env` ter-ignore.

**M1 — DB & schema + migrate/seed.** `db/schema.sql`, `lib/db.ts` (WAL), `scripts/migrate.mjs` + `seed.mjs` (jadwal 07:00 & 16:00; device 2 valve+1 pompa placeholder; fuzzy default dari kode kamu; settings: pump_delay_on=7, pump_delay_off=0, safety_max_minutes=60; admin user dari `ADMIN_USERNAME/PASSWORD`). `brain/db.py`. _Uji:_ jalankan migrate+seed, cek `.tables`, file `-wal` muncul, baris seed benar.

**M2 — Telegram helper (shared).** `lib/telegram.ts` + `brain/notify.py`: `send_telegram(level,msg)`, baca token dari settings; jika kosong → **log-only**. Ditaruh lebih awal karena brain/run/watchdog semua butuh. _Uji:_ token kosong → cuma log; `python brain/notify.py "test"` kirim nyata bila token diisi.

**M3 — Wrapper eWeLink + DRY_RUN.** `lib/ewelink.ts`: login persisten (email+password+APP_ID+APP_SECRET, region `as`), `listDevices/getPowerState/setPowerState`, `verifyState(...,retries=3)`. **DRY_RUN:** setPowerState hanya log + event_log + shadow state, tanpa relay. _Uji:_ DRY_RUN=1 → log saja; (saat kamu izinkan) DRY_RUN=0 → `listDevices` tampil device asli. **Risiko diuji di sini:** kompat `ewelink-api` lama dengan Node 22 — `getDevices` dites lebih dulu.

**M4 — Endpoint device (terbuka).** `api/device/{list,status,on,off}`. Tanpa auth (sesuai keputusanmu). Tiap aksi → event_log. _Uji:_ `curl` tiap endpoint di DRY_RUN, cek log + shadow status.

**M5 — Orkestrasi `/api/run` (ON) & `/api/stop` (OFF).** ON: valve ch1+ch2 → tunggu `pump_delay_on_seconds` → pompa; tulis `irrigation_runs` + 3 `channel_state` dengan `expected_off_at = now + durasi`; verifikasi+retry; notif "menyala". OFF: pompa → (delay) → valve; update state → completed; verifikasi. **Tanpa `sleep(durasi)`** — hanya jeda 7 dtk; shutoff lewat `expected_off_at`. Durasi di-clamp ke `safety_max_minutes` (defense-in-depth). `/api/run-now` (spawn brain), `/api/runs` (history). _Uji:_ DRY_RUN `/api/run {duration_minutes:5}` → urutan valve→7s→pompa di log, `expected_off_at`=+5m; `/api/stop` → urutan pompa→valve.

**M6 — Brain + Fuzzy.** `fuzzy_controller.py` (kode kamu, verbatim). `brain.py`: build `FuzzyConfig(**row)` dari DB tiap run; **`map_agrihub_response()` = satu adapter berkomentar** (PLACEHOLDER: weather temp/rh/wind/radiation, soil s0/s1/s2 → avg); fetch agrihub (base_url+2 apikey dari settings); `compute()` → durasi; `0.0` → tulis `skipped` + notif → selesai; `>0` → POST `/api/run`. Flag `--mock` (pakai sample data spec) untuk uji tanpa agrihub. `requirements.txt` = list kamu + requests + python-dotenv. _Uji:_ `python fuzzy_controller.py` (tabel sample jalan); `python brain.py manual --mock` → cetak ET0+durasi; path skip saat tanah basah.

**M7 — Scheduler dinamis.** `lib/scheduler.ts` (node-cron): saat boot baca `schedules` enabled, register job per `HH:MM` (Asia/Jakarta) → spawn `brain.py schedule`; `reloadSchedules()` dipanggil setelah jadwal/ setting berubah. Start via `instrumentation.ts` (guard anti dobel di dev). _Uji:_ sisipkan jadwal +1 menit, lihat brain ter-spawn (DRY_RUN); ubah jadwal → re-register.

**M8 — Watchdog (cron OS).** `watchdog.py`: baca `channel_state` on; `now>=expected_off_at` → `/api/stop`; **safety cutoff** (`on_at` > safety_max_minutes) → paksa stop + notif error; verifikasi via `/api/device/status` retry 3x → mismatch → notif anomali; update `last_checked_at/verified` + event_log. Independen dari Control App untuk *deteksi*; eksekusi relay via `/api/stop` (mengandalkan PM2/systemd menjaga Control App hidup — bila tak terjangkau, watchdog retry + alert keras). _Uji:_ sisipkan `channel_state` palsu (expected_off_at lampau) → `python watchdog.py` panggil `/api/stop`; uji safety cutoff.

**M9 — UI + Auth.** `lib/auth.ts` (scrypt hash + cookie HMAC), `app/login` + server action, `middleware.ts` proteksi semua route **kecuali** `/login`, `/api/*`, static. Mutasi setting lewat **server actions** (terproteksi login) sementara API kontrol tetap terbuka. Halaman: Dashboard (state + runs + tombol Run-now), Schedules (CRUD), Devices, Fuzzy (semua breakpoint), Settings (agrihub url+2 apikey, telegram, delays, safety_max), Logs. Perubahan jadwal/setting → `reloadSchedules()`. _Uji:_ `/` → redirect `/login`; login admin seed; edit fuzzy/jadwal/setting → DB + reload; API kontrol tetap bisa di-`curl` tanpa login.

**M10 — Deploy + README + end-to-end.** `deploy/nginx.conf` (proxy_pass :3000, tanpa HTTPS), `pm2.config.js`, `fertigation.service`, `crontab.example` (watchdog tiap menit via venv). `README.md`: install deps, isi `.env`, migrate+seed, build & run (PM2/systemd), pasang watchdog cron, set Nginx, urutan uji end-to-end. _Uji:_ ikuti README di DRY_RUN untuk validasi alur; uji device nyata = di VPS oleh kamu.

---

## Pemetaan "HARUS dipatuhi" → tempat ditegakkan

| Aturan | Milestone |
|---|---|
| Tanpa `sleep(durasi)`; shutoff via `expected_off_at` + watchdog | M5, M8 |
| Safety cutoff absolut & independen | M8 (+ clamp di M5) |
| Verifikasi tiap ON/OFF + retry, mismatch → notif | M3, M5, M8 |
| Urutan ON valve→7s→pompa, OFF pompa→valve (eksplisit) | M5 |
| Fuzzy <1 mnt → skip + log + notif | M6 (& bawaan `compute()`) |
| Scheduler dinamis DB; watchdog cron OS independen | M7, M8 |
| SQLite WAL | M1 |
| Kredensial hanya `.env`/settings; `.env.example`; `.gitignore`; tanpa fallback rahasia | M0 + sepanjang |
| Auth UI; API kontrol terbuka | M9 |
| Mapping agrihub = 1 adapter placeholder mudah diubah | M6 |

## Verifikasi end-to-end (DRY_RUN, di dev)

1. migrate+seed → cek tabel & WAL.
2. `python fuzzy_controller.py` → tabel sample keluar (scikit-fuzzy ok).
3. `python brain.py manual --mock` → ET0+durasi; uji path skip.
4. `curl /api/run {duration_minutes:2}` → cek urutan valve→7s→pompa + `expected_off_at`.
5. `python watchdog.py` → matikan run kadaluarsa (urutan pompa→valve).
6. Login UI → ubah jadwal/fuzzy → cek reload + DB.
7. (VPS, saat kamu izinkan) DRY_RUN=0 → `listDevices` → run-now nyata → cek relay → watchdog OFF → notif Telegram.

## Risiko terbuka (ditangani saat eksekusi)

- **`ewelink-api` lama × Node 22** — diuji `getDevices` lebih dulu (M3); bila perlu, pin versi lib/Node di VPS.
- **better-sqlite3 native build** (Windows dev) — biasanya ada prebuild; fallback `node:sqlite` bila gagal.
- **Format JSON agrihub belum final** — diisolasi di `map_agrihub_response()` (M6), diberi komentar jelas.
- **Watchdog butuh Control App hidup** untuk eksekusi relay (eWeLink terpusat di Control App) — dimitigasi auto-restart PM2/systemd + alert keras bila tak terjangkau.

**M1 — DB & schema + migrate/seed.** `db/schema.sql`, `lib/db.ts` (WAL), `scripts/migrate.mjs` + `seed.mjs` (jadwal 07:00 & 16:00; device 2 valve+1 pompa placeholder; fuzzy default dari kode kamu; settings: pump_delay_on=7, pump_delay_off=0, safety_max_minutes=60; admin user dari `ADMIN_USERNAME/PASSWORD`). `brain/db.py`. _Uji:_ jalankan migrate+seed, cek `.tables`, file `-wal` muncul, baris seed benar.

**M2 — Telegram helper (shared).** `lib/telegram.ts` + `brain/notify.py`: `send_telegram(level,msg)`, baca token dari settings; jika kosong → **log-only**. Ditaruh lebih awal karena brain/run/watchdog semua butuh. _Uji:_ token kosong → cuma log; `python brain/notify.py "test"` kirim nyata bila token diisi.

**M3 — Wrapper eWeLink + DRY_RUN.** `lib/ewelink.ts`: login persisten (email+password+APP_ID+APP_SECRET, region `as`), `listDevices/getPowerState/setPowerState`, `verifyState(...,retries=3)`. **DRY_RUN:** setPowerState hanya log + event_log + shadow state, tanpa relay. _Uji:_ DRY_RUN=1 → log saja; (saat kamu izinkan) DRY_RUN=0 → `listDevices` tampil device asli. **Risiko diuji di sini:** kompat `ewelink-api` lama dengan Node 22 — `getDevices` dites lebih dulu.

**M4 — Endpoint device (terbuka).** `api/device/{list,status,on,off}`. Tanpa auth (sesuai keputusanmu). Tiap aksi → event_log. _Uji:_ `curl` tiap endpoint di DRY_RUN, cek log + shadow status.

**M5 — Orkestrasi `/api/run` (ON) & `/api/stop` (OFF).** ON: valve ch1+ch2 → tunggu `pump_delay_on_seconds` → pompa; tulis `irrigation_runs` + 3 `channel_state` dengan `expected_off_at = now + durasi`; verifikasi+retry; notif "menyala". OFF: pompa → (delay) → valve; update state → completed; verifikasi. **Tanpa `sleep(durasi)`** — hanya jeda 7 dtk; shutoff lewat `expected_off_at`. Durasi di-clamp ke `safety_max_minutes` (defense-in-depth). `/api/run-now` (spawn brain), `/api/runs` (history). _Uji:_ DRY_RUN `/api/run {duration_minutes:5}` → urutan valve→7s→pompa di log, `expected_off_at`=+5m; `/api/stop` → urutan pompa→valve.

**M6 — Brain + Fuzzy.** `fuzzy_controller.py` (kode kamu, verbatim). `brain.py`: build `FuzzyConfig(**row)` dari DB tiap run; **`map_agrihub_response()` = satu adapter berkomentar** (PLACEHOLDER: weather temp/rh/wind/radiation, soil s0/s1/s2 → avg); fetch agrihub (base_url+2 apikey dari settings); `compute()` → durasi; `0.0` → tulis `skipped` + notif → selesai; `>0` → POST `/api/run`. Flag `--mock` (pakai sample data spec) untuk uji tanpa agrihub. `requirements.txt` = list kamu + requests + python-dotenv. _Uji:_ `python fuzzy_controller.py` (tabel sample jalan); `python brain.py manual --mock` → cetak ET0+durasi; path skip saat tanah basah.

**M7 — Scheduler dinamis.** `lib/scheduler.ts` (node-cron): saat boot baca `schedules` enabled, register job per `HH:MM` (Asia/Jakarta) → spawn `brain.py schedule`; `reloadSchedules()` dipanggil setelah jadwal/ setting berubah. Start via `instrumentation.ts` (guard anti dobel di dev). _Uji:_ sisipkan jadwal +1 menit, lihat brain ter-spawn (DRY_RUN); ubah jadwal → re-register.

**M8 — Watchdog (cron OS).** `watchdog.py`: baca `channel_state` on; `now>=expected_off_at` → `/api/stop`; **safety cutoff** (`on_at` > safety_max_minutes) → paksa stop + notif error; verifikasi via `/api/device/status` retry 3x → mismatch → notif anomali; update `last_checked_at/verified` + event_log. Independen dari Control App untuk *deteksi*; eksekusi relay via `/api/stop` (mengandalkan PM2/systemd menjaga Control App hidup — bila tak terjangkau, watchdog retry + alert keras). _Uji:_ sisipkan `channel_state` palsu (expected_off_at lampau) → `python watchdog.py` panggil `/api/stop`; uji safety cutoff.

**M9 — UI + Auth.** `lib/auth.ts` (scrypt hash + cookie HMAC), `app/login` + server action, `middleware.ts` proteksi semua route **kecuali** `/login`, `/api/*`, static. Mutasi setting lewat **server actions** (terproteksi login) sementara API kontrol tetap terbuka. Halaman: Dashboard (state + runs + tombol Run-now), Schedules (CRUD), Devices, Fuzzy (semua breakpoint), Settings (agrihub url+2 apikey, telegram, delays, safety_max), Logs. Perubahan jadwal/setting → `reloadSchedules()`. _Uji:_ `/` → redirect `/login`; login admin seed; edit fuzzy/jadwal/setting → DB + reload; API kontrol tetap bisa di-`curl` tanpa login.

**M10 — Deploy + README + end-to-end.** `deploy/nginx.conf` (proxy_pass :3000, tanpa HTTPS), `pm2.config.js`, `fertigation.service`, `crontab.example` (watchdog tiap menit via venv). `README.md`: install deps, isi `.env`, migrate+seed, build & run (PM2/systemd), pasang watchdog cron, set Nginx, urutan uji end-to-end. _Uji:_ ikuti README di DRY_RUN untuk validasi alur; uji device nyata = di VPS oleh kamu.

---

## Pemetaan "HARUS dipatuhi" → tempat ditegakkan

| Aturan | Milestone |
|---|---|
| Tanpa `sleep(durasi)`; shutoff via `expected_off_at` + watchdog | M5, M8 |
| Safety cutoff absolut & independen | M8 (+ clamp di M5) |
| Verifikasi tiap ON/OFF + retry, mismatch → notif | M3, M5, M8 |
| Urutan ON valve→7s→pompa, OFF pompa→valve (eksplisit) | M5 |
| Fuzzy <1 mnt → skip + log + notif | M6 (& bawaan `compute()`) |
| Scheduler dinamis DB; watchdog cron OS independen | M7, M8 |
| SQLite WAL | M1 |
| Kredensial hanya `.env`/settings; `.env.example`; `.gitignore`; tanpa fallback rahasia | M0 + sepanjang |
| Auth UI; API kontrol terbuka | M9 |
| Mapping agrihub = 1 adapter placeholder mudah diubah | M6 |

## Verifikasi end-to-end (DRY_RUN, di dev)

1. migrate+seed → cek tabel & WAL.
2. `python fuzzy_controller.py` → tabel sample keluar (scikit-fuzzy ok).
3. `python brain.py manual --mock` → ET0+durasi; uji path skip.
4. `curl /api/run {duration_minutes:2}` → cek urutan valve→7s→pompa + `expected_off_at`.
5. `python watchdog.py` → matikan run kadaluarsa (urutan pompa→valve).
6. Login UI → ubah jadwal/fuzzy → cek reload + DB.
7. (VPS, saat kamu izinkan) DRY_RUN=0 → `listDevices` → run-now nyata → cek relay → watchdog OFF → notif Telegram.

## Risiko terbuka (ditangani saat eksekusi)

- **`ewelink-api` lama × Node 22** — diuji `getDevices` lebih dulu (M3); bila perlu, pin versi lib/Node di VPS.
- **better-sqlite3 native build** (Windows dev) — biasanya ada prebuild; fallback `node:sqlite` bila gagal.
- **Format JSON agrihub belum final** — diisolasi di `map_agrihub_response()` (M6), diberi komentar jelas.
- **Watchdog butuh Control App hidup** untuk eksekusi relay (eWeLink terpusat di Control App) — dimitigasi auto-restart PM2/systemd + alert keras bila tak terjangkau.

content.text:
Rencana milestone sudah siap. Ringkasannya:

- **11 milestone** (M0–M10): scaffold → DB/schema → telegram → wrapper eWeLink (+DRY_RUN) → endpoint device → orkestrasi ON/OFF → brain+fuzzy → scheduler → watchdog → UI+auth → deploy/README.
- Telegram kupindah lebih awal (M2) karena brain, `/api/run`, dan watchdog sama-sama butuh — menghindari stub.
- **DRY_RUN default ON**: relay fisik tidak pernah dipicu sampai kamu eksplisit izinkan, dan aku selalu bilang dulu.
- Fuzzy pakai kodemu apa adanya; auth login app saja, API kontrol terbuka — sesuai jawabanmu.
- Berhenti & uji setelah tiap milestone.

Semua aturan "HARUS dipatuhi" sudah kupetakan ke milestone tempat ditegakkan (tabel di plan).

allowedPrompts.prompt: scaffold Next.js app and install npm dependencies
run node/npm scripts (migrate, seed, build, dev)
create and use a Python virtualenv and pip install requirements
run python scripts (brain, watchdog, fuzzy) for testing
git init and local git operations

input.plan:
# Rencana Implementasi — Sistem Fertigasi Otomatis AgriHub

## Context

Membangun sistem fertigasi sprinkler otomatis dari nol di folder kosong, di-deploy di VPS
Ubuntu. Sumber kebenaran = `agrihub-fertigation-plan.md` (sudah dibaca penuh). Tiga komponen di
satu VPS, komunikasi via `localhost`:

- **Control App (Next.js)** — UI setting + REST API kontrol eWeLink + DB SQLite + scheduler internal.
- **Brain (Python)** — ambil sensor dari agrihub.id → fuzzy → durasi → POST `/api/run`.
- **Watchdog (Python, cron tiap menit)** — jaring pengaman: matikan valve kadaluarsa, safety cutoff, verifikasi, notif.

**Keputusan terkunci (dari spec + 2 jawabanmu, tidak ditanya ulang):**
- `ewelink-api` lama (skydiver), email+password, region `as`. Bukan OAuth/next.
- SQLite **WAL mode** lokal VPS. Tidak menyentuh Supabase — data hanya via HTTP ke agrihub.id.
- 2 valve nyala bareng (1 output fuzzy). **ON:** valve → 7 dtk → pompa. **OFF:** pompa → valve. Eksplisit.
- Fuzzy `< 1 menit` → **skip total** + log + notif Telegram.
- Jadwal **dinamis dari DB/UI** (seed 07:00 & 16:00, Asia/Jakarta). Watchdog tetap cron OS, independen.
- Notif Telegram: start / selesai / skip / anomali.
- **Fuzzy:** pakai `fuzzy_controller.py` yang kamu kirim **apa adanya**; hanya `FuzzyConfig` dibaca dari DB tiap run.
- **Auth:** login app (tabel `users` di SQLite, cookie + middleware). **API kontrol terbuka** (brain/watchdog bebas akses). Tanpa Nginx auth.
- Deploy: Nginx reverse proxy (tanpa HTTPS), PM2/systemd, watchdog via crontab.

## Pilihan teknis (keputusanku, bisa kamu koreksi)

| Area | Pilihan | Alasan |
|---|---|---|
| Control App | Next.js **App Router** + TypeScript | modern default; route handlers + server actions |
| DB driver (Node) | **better-sqlite3** | sinkron, WAL bersih, teruji; fallback `node:sqlite` jika gagal build native |
| DB driver (Python) | `sqlite3` stdlib | brain + watchdog cukup stdlib |
| Scheduler | **node-cron** | rekomendasi spec; baca jadwal dari DB |
| Trigger brain | `child_process` spawn `python brain.py <schedule|manual>` | fuzzy tetap di Python |
| Auth | `users` SQLite + hash `node:crypto scrypt` + cookie HMAC (`SESSION_SECRET`) | tanpa dependency native tambahan |
| CSS | global stylesheet ringan (tanpa Tailwind) | panel kecil, deps minimal |
| Telegram | `fetch` (Node) / `requests` (Python) ke Bot API | helper bersama tiap bahasa |

**Pemisahan kredensial:** eWeLink (email/password/APP_ID/APP_SECRET) **hanya di `.env`** (cuma
Control App yang bicara ke eWeLink). agrihub keys + Telegram token disimpan di tabel `settings`
(editable dari UI), boleh di-seed dari `.env`. Tanpa pola fallback `process.env.X || "rahasia"`.

## Struktur folder

```
/ (repo root)
├── .env.example          # semua key, tanpa nilai rahasia
├── .gitignore            # .env, node_modules, .venv, *.db*, .next
├── README.md
├── control-app/          # Next.js
│   ├── app/
│   │   ├── api/device/{list,status,on,off}/route.ts
│   │   ├── api/{run,stop,run-now,runs}/route.ts
│   │   ├── login/ , (dashboard, schedules, devices, fuzzy, settings, logs)
│   │   └── instrumentation.ts        # start scheduler
│   ├── lib/{db,ewelink,telegram,scheduler,auth,env}.ts
│   ├── middleware.ts
│   └── scripts/{migrate,seed}.mjs
├── brain/
│   ├── fuzzy_controller.py   # kode kamu, verbatim
│   ├── brain.py              # adapter agrihub → fuzzy → POST /api/run
│   ├── db.py , notify.py     # helper dipakai brain + watchdog
│   └── requirements.txt
├── watchdog/
│   └── watchdog.py
├── db/
│   └── schema.sql
└── deploy/
    ├── nginx.conf
    ├── pm2.config.js
    ├── fertigation.service   # alternatif systemd
    └── crontab.example
```

## Skema DB (db/schema.sql)

Tabel §7 + `users`: `fuzzy_config` (kolom = field `FuzzyConfig`: sdmin…swmax, elmin…ehmax,
os/om/ol/output_max, updated_at), `device_config` (role/device_id/channel/label/enabled),
`schedules` (time HH:MM/enabled/timezone), `settings` (k-v), `irrigation_runs`, `channel_state`
(run_id/device_id/channel/role/state/on_at/**expected_off_at**/verified/last_checked_at),
`event_log`, `users` (username/password_hash). Tiap koneksi: `PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL`,
`foreign_keys=ON`, `busy_timeout=5000`.

**M4 — Endpoint device (terbuka).** `api/device/{list,status,on,off}`. Tanpa auth (sesuai keputusanmu). Tiap aksi → event_log. _Uji:_ `curl` tiap endpoint di DRY_RUN, cek log + shadow status.

**M5 — Orkestrasi `/api/run` (ON) & `/api/stop` (OFF).** ON: valve ch1+ch2 → tunggu `pump_delay_on_seconds` → pompa; tulis `irrigation_runs` + 3 `channel_state` dengan `expected_off_at = now + durasi`; verifikasi+retry; notif "menyala". | Trigger brain | `child_process` spawn `python brain.py <schedule|manual>` | fuzzy tetap di Python |
| Auth | `users` SQLite + hash `node:crypto scrypt` + cookie HMAC (`SESSION_SECRET`) | tanpa dependency native tambahan |
| CSS | global stylesheet ringan (tanpa Tailwind) | panel kecil, deps minimal |
| Telegram | `fetch` (Node) / `requests` (Python) ke Bot API | helper bersama tiap bahasa |

**Pemisahan kredensial:** eWeLink (email/password/APP_ID/APP_SECRET) **hanya di `.env`** (cuma
Control App yang bicara ke eWeLink). agrihub keys + Telegram token disimpan di tabel `settings`
(editable dari UI), boleh di-seed dari `.env`. Tanpa pola fallback `process.env.X || "rahasia"`.

## Struktur folder

```
/ (repo root)
├── .env.example          # semua key, tanpa nilai rahasia
├── .gitignore            # .env, node_modules, .venv, *.db*, .next
├── README.md
├── control-app/          # Next.js
│   ├── app/
│   │   ├── api/device/{list,status,on,off}/route.ts
│   │   ├── api/{run,stop,run-now,runs}/route.ts
│   │   ├── login/ , (dashboard, schedules, devices, fuzzy, settings, logs)
│   │   └── instrumentation.ts        # start scheduler
│   ├── lib/{db,ewelink,telegram,scheduler,auth,env}.ts
│   ├── middleware.ts
│   └── scripts/{migrate,seed}.mjs
├── brain/
│   ├── fuzzy_controller.py   # kode kamu, verbatim
│   ├── brain.py              # adapter agrihub → fuzzy → POST /api/run
│   ├── db.py , notify.py     # helper dipakai brain + watchdog
│   └── requirements.txt
├── watchdog/
│   └── watchdog.py
├── db/
│   └── schema.sql
└── deploy/
    ├── nginx.conf
    ├── pm2.config.js
    ├── fertigation.service   # alternatif systemd
    └── crontab.example
```

## Skema DB (db/schema.sql)

Tabel §7 + `users`: `fuzzy_config` (kolom = field `FuzzyConfig`: sdmin…swmax, elmin…ehmax,
os/om/ol/output_max, updated_at), `device_config` (role/device_id/channel/label/enabled),
`schedules` (time HH:MM/enabled/timezone), `settings` (k-v), `irrigation_runs`, `channel_state`
(run_id/device_id/channel/role/state/on_at/**expected_off_at**/verified/last_checked_at),
`event_log`, `users` (username/password_hash). Tiap koneksi: `PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL`,
`foreign_keys=ON`, `busy_timeout=5000`.

---

## Milestones (dikerjakan satu per satu, berhenti & uji tiap selesai)

> Setelah TIAP milestone aku berhenti, jelaskan singkat hasilnya + cara uji, lalu tunggu kamu
> lanjut. **`EWELINK_DRY_RUN=1` default ON** — relay fisik tidak pernah dipicu sampai kamu
> eksplisit menyalakannya, dan aku selalu bilang dulu sebelum aksi nyata ke device.

**M0 — Scaffold & skeleton.** `git init`, `.gitignore`, `.env.example`, tree folder, `create-next-app` (TS, App Router), install deps (better-sqlite3, node-cron, ewelink-api). _Uji:_ `npm install` ok, `npm run dev` tampil placeholder, `.env` ter-ignore.

**M1 — DB & schema + migrate/seed.** `db/schema.sql`, `lib/db.ts` (WAL), `scripts/migrate.mjs` + `seed.mjs` (jadwal 07:00 & 16:00; device 2 valve+1 pompa placeholder; fuzzy default dari kode kamu; settings: pump_delay_on=7, pump_delay_off=0, safety_max_minutes=60; admin user dari `ADMIN_USERNAME/PASSWORD`). `brain/db.py`. _Uji:_ jalankan migrate+seed, cek `.tables`, file `-wal` muncul, baris seed benar.

**M2 — Telegram helper (shared).** `lib/telegram.ts` + `brain/notify.py`: `send_telegram(level,msg)`, baca token dari settings; jika kosong → **log-only**. Ditaruh lebih awal karena brain/run/watchdog semua butuh. _Uji:_ token kosong → cuma log; `python brain/notify.py "test"` kirim nyata bila token diisi.

**M3 — Wrapper eWeLink + DRY_RUN.** `lib/ewelink.ts`: login persisten (email+password+APP_ID+APP_SECRET, region `as`), `listDevices/getPowerState/setPowerState`, `verifyState(...,retries=3)`. **DRY_RUN:** setPowerState hanya log + event_log + shadow state, tanpa relay. _Uji:_ DRY_RUN=1 → log saja; (saat kamu izinkan) DRY_RUN=0 → `listDevices` tampil device asli. **Risiko diuji di sini:** kompat `ewelink-api` lama dengan Node 22 — `getDevices` dites lebih dulu.

**M4 — Endpoint device (terbuka).** `api/device/{list,status,on,off}`. Tanpa auth (sesuai keputusanmu). Tiap aksi → event_log. _Uji:_ `curl` tiap endpoint di DRY_RUN, cek log + shadow status.

**M5 — Orkestrasi `/api/run` (ON) & `/api/stop` (OFF).** ON: valve ch1+ch2 → tunggu `pump_delay_on_seconds` → pompa; tulis `irrigation_runs` + 3 `channel_state` dengan `expected_off_at = now + durasi`; verifikasi+retry; notif "menyala". OFF: pompa → (delay) → valve; update state → completed; verifikasi. **Tanpa `sleep(durasi)`** — hanya jeda 7 dtk; shutoff lewat `expected_off_at`. Durasi di-clamp ke `safety_max_minutes` (defense-in-depth). `/api/run-now` (spawn brain), `/api/runs` (history). _Uji:_ DRY_RUN `/api/run {duration_minutes:5}` → urutan valve→7s→pompa di log, `expected_off_at`=+5m; `/api/stop` → urutan pompa→valve.

**M6 — Brain + Fuzzy.** `fuzzy_controller.py` (kode kamu, verbatim). `brain.py`: build `FuzzyConfig(**row)` dari DB tiap run; **`map_agrihub_response()` = satu adapter berkomentar** (PLACEHOLDER: weather temp/rh/wind/radiation, soil s0/s1/s2 → avg); fetch agrihub (base_url+2 apikey dari settings); `compute()` → durasi; `0.0` → tulis `skipped` + notif → selesai; `>0` → POST `/api/run`. Flag `--mock` (pakai sample data spec) untuk uji tanpa agrihub. `requirements.txt` = list kamu + requests + python-dotenv. _Uji:_ `python fuzzy_controller.py` (tabel sample jalan); `python brain.py manual --mock` → cetak ET0+durasi; path skip saat tanah basah.

**M7 — Scheduler dinamis.** `lib/scheduler.ts` (node-cron): saat boot baca `schedules` enabled, register job per `HH:MM` (Asia/Jakarta) → spawn `brain.py schedule`; `reloadSchedules()` dipanggil setelah jadwal/ setting berubah. Start via `instrumentation.ts` (guard anti dobel di dev). _Uji:_ sisipkan jadwal +1 menit, lihat brain ter-spawn (DRY_RUN); ubah jadwal → re-register.

**M8 — Watchdog (cron OS).** `watchdog.py`: baca `channel_state` on; `now>=expected_off_at` → `/api/stop`; **safety cutoff** (`on_at` > safety_max_minutes) → paksa stop + notif error; verifikasi via `/api/device/status` retry 3x → mismatch → notif anomali; update `last_checked_at/verified` + event_log. Independen dari Control App untuk *deteksi*; eksekusi relay via `/api/stop` (mengandalkan PM2/systemd menjaga Control App hidup — bila tak terjangkau, watchdog retry + alert keras). _Uji:_ sisipkan `channel_state` palsu (expected_off_at lampau) → `python watchdog.py` panggil `/api/stop`; uji safety cutoff.

**M9 — UI + Auth.** `lib/auth.ts` (scrypt hash + cookie HMAC), `app/login` + server action, `middleware.ts` proteksi semua route **kecuali** `/login`, `/api/*`, static. Mutasi setting lewat **server actions** (terproteksi login) sementara API kontrol tetap terbuka. Halaman: Dashboard (state + runs + tombol Run-now), Schedules (CRUD), Devices, Fuzzy (semua breakpoint), Settings (agrihub url+2 apikey, telegram, delays, safety_max), Logs. Perubahan jadwal/setting → `reloadSchedules()`. _Uji:_ `/` → redirect `/login`; login admin seed; edit fuzzy/jadwal/setting → DB + reload; API kontrol tetap bisa di-`curl` tanpa login.

**M10 — Deploy + README + end-to-end.** `deploy/nginx.conf` (proxy_pass :3000, tanpa HTTPS), `pm2.config.js`, `fertigation.service`, `crontab.example` (watchdog tiap menit via venv). `README.md`: install deps, isi `.env`, migrate+seed, build & run (PM2/systemd), pasang watchdog cron, set Nginx, urutan uji end-to-end. _Uji:_ ikuti README di DRY_RUN untuk validasi alur; uji device nyata = di VPS oleh kamu.

---

## Pemetaan "HARUS dipatuhi" → tempat ditegakkan

| Aturan | Milestone |
|---|---|
| Tanpa `sleep(durasi)`; shutoff via `expected_off_at` + watchdog | M5, M8 |
| Safety cutoff absolut & independen | M8 (+ clamp di M5) |
| Verifikasi tiap ON/OFF + retry, mismatch → notif | M3, M5, M8 |
| Urutan ON valve→7s→pompa, OFF pompa→valve (eksplisit) | M5 |
| Fuzzy <1 mnt → skip + log + notif | M6 (& bawaan `compute()`) |
| Scheduler dinamis DB; watchdog cron OS independen | M7, M8 |
| SQLite WAL | M1 |
| Kredensial hanya `.env`/settings; `.env.example`; `.gitignore`; tanpa fallback rahasia | M0 + sepanjang |
| Auth UI; API kontrol terbuka | M9 |
| Mapping agrihub = 1 adapter placeholder mudah diubah | M6 |

## Verifikasi end-to-end (DRY_RUN, di dev)

1. migrate+seed → cek tabel & WAL.
2. `python fuzzy_controller.py` → tabel sample keluar (scikit-fuzzy ok).
3. `python brain.py manual --mock` → ET0+durasi; uji path skip.
4. `curl /api/run {duration_minutes:2}` → cek urutan valve→7s→pompa + `expected_off_at`.
5. `python watchdog.py` → matikan run kadaluarsa (urutan pompa→valve).
6. Login UI → ubah jadwal/fuzzy → cek reload + DB.
7. (VPS, saat kamu izinkan) DRY_RUN=0 → `listDevices` → run-now nyata → cek relay → watchdog OFF → notif Telegram.

## Risiko terbuka (ditangani saat eksekusi)

- **`ewelink-api` lama × Node 22** — diuji `getDevices` lebih dulu (M3); bila perlu, pin versi lib/Node di VPS.
- **better-sqlite3 native build** (Windows dev) — biasanya ada prebuild; fallback `node:sqlite` bila gagal.
- **Format JSON agrihub belum final** — diisolasi di `map_agrihub_response()` (M6), diberi komentar jelas.
- **Watchdog butuh Control App hidup** untuk eksekusi relay (eWeLink terpusat di Control App) — dimitigasi auto-restart PM2/systemd + alert keras bila tak terjangkau.

toolUseResult.plan:
# Rencana Implementasi — Sistem Fertigasi Otomatis AgriHub

## Context

Membangun sistem fertigasi sprinkler otomatis dari nol di folder kosong, di-deploy di VPS
Ubuntu. Sumber kebenaran = `agrihub-fertigation-plan.md` (sudah dibaca penuh). Tiga komponen di
satu VPS, komunikasi via `localhost`:

- **Control App (Next.js)** — UI setting + REST API kontrol eWeLink + DB SQLite + scheduler internal.
- **Brain (Python)** — ambil sensor dari agrihub.id → fuzzy → durasi → POST `/api/run`.
- **Watchdog (Python, cron tiap menit)** — jaring pengaman: matikan valve kadaluarsa, safety cutoff, verifikasi, notif.

**Keputusan terkunci (dari spec + 2 jawabanmu, tidak ditanya ulang):**
- `ewelink-api` lama (skydiver), email+password, region `as`. Bukan OAuth/next.
- SQLite **WAL mode** lokal VPS. Tidak menyentuh Supabase — data hanya via HTTP ke agrihub.id.
- 2 valve nyala bareng (1 output fuzzy). **ON:** valve → 7 dtk → pompa. **OFF:** pompa → valve. Eksplisit.
- Fuzzy `< 1 menit` → **skip total** + log + notif Telegram.
- Jadwal **dinamis dari DB/UI** (seed 07:00 & 16:00, Asia/Jakarta). Watchdog tetap cron OS, independen.
- Notif Telegram: start / selesai / skip / anomali.
- **Fuzzy:** pakai `fuzzy_controller.py` yang kamu kirim **apa adanya**; hanya `FuzzyConfig` dibaca dari DB tiap run.
- **Auth:** login app (tabel `users` di SQLite, cookie + middleware). **API kontrol terbuka** (brain/watchdog bebas akses). Tanpa Nginx auth.
- Deploy: Nginx reverse proxy (tanpa HTTPS), PM2/systemd, watchdog via crontab.

## Pilihan teknis (keputusanku, bisa kamu koreksi)

| Area | Pilihan | Alasan |
|---|---|---|
| Control App | Next.js **App Router** + TypeScript | modern default; route handlers + server actions |
| DB driver (Node) | **better-sqlite3** | sinkron, WAL bersih, teruji; fallback `node:sqlite` jika gagal build native |
| DB driver (Python) | `sqlite3` stdlib | brain + watchdog cukup stdlib |
| Scheduler | **node-cron** | rekomendasi spec; baca jadwal dari DB |
| Trigger brain | `child_process` spawn `python brain.py <schedule|manual>` | fuzzy tetap di Python |
| Auth | `users` SQLite + hash `node:crypto scrypt` + cookie HMAC (`SESSION_SECRET`) | tanpa dependency native tambahan |
| CSS | global stylesheet ringan (tanpa Tailwind) | panel kecil, deps minimal |
| Telegram | `fetch` (Node) / `requests` (Python) ke Bot API | helper bersama tiap bahasa |

**Pemisahan kredensial:** eWeLink (email/password/APP_ID/APP_SECRET) **hanya di `.env`** (cuma
Control App yang bicara ke eWeLink). agrihub keys + Telegram token disimpan di tabel `settings`
(editable dari UI), boleh di-seed dari `.env`. Tanpa pola fallback `process.env.X || "rahasia"`.

## Struktur folder

```

├── .gitignore            # .env, node_modules, .venv, *.db*, .next

│   │   ├── api/device/{list,status,on,off}/route.ts
│   │   ├── api/{run,stop,run-now,runs}/route.ts
│   │   ├── login/ , (dashboard, schedules, devices, fuzzy, settings, logs)
│   │   └── instrumentation.ts        # start scheduler
│   ├── lib/{db,ewelink,telegram,scheduler,auth,env}.ts
│   ├── middleware.ts
│   └── scripts/{migrate,seed}.mjs
├── brain/
│   ├── fuzzy_controller.py   # kode kamu, verbatim
│   ├── brain.py              # adapter agrihub → fuzzy → POST /api/run
│   ├── db.py , notify.py     # helper dipakai brain + watchdog
│   └── requirements.txt
├── watchdog/
│   └── watchdog.py
├── db/
│   └── schema.sql
└── deploy/
    ├── nginx.conf
    ├── pm2.config.js
    ├── fertigation.service   # alternatif systemd
    └── crontab.example
```

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# AgriHub Fertigation — environment template.
# Copy to `.env` at the repo root and fill in real values. NEVER commit `.env`.
# Loaded by Control App (Node) and by brain/watchdog (Python via python-dotenv).
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

# --- eWeLink (Control App only — the single component that talks to eWeLink) ---
# Old skydiver ewelink-api: email + password + app credentials, region 'as'.
# Do NOT hardcode these anywhere in code, and never use a `X || "secret"` fallback.
EWELINK_EMAIL=
EWELINK_PASSWORD=
EWELINK_APP_ID=
EWELINK_APP_SECRET=
EWELINK_REGION=as

# Safety: 1 = dry-run (log intended relay actions, never trigger real hardware).
# Keep this at 1 until you have explicitly verified everything and want real relays.
EWELINK_DRY_RUN=1

# --- Control App ---
# Port the Next.js Control App listens on.
PORT=3000
# Base URL brain/watchdog use to reach the Control App over localhost.
CONTROL_APP_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000
# Timezone for scheduler + timestamps.
TZ=Asia/Jakarta

# --- Auth (UI login only; control APIs stay open for brain/watchdog) ---
# Secret used to sign the session cookie (HMAC). Use a long random string.
SESSION_SECRET=
# Seed credentials for the initial admin user (used ONCE by the seed script).
# After first seed you can change the password from the DB/UI.
ADMIN_USERNAME=admin
ADMIN_PASSWORD=

# --- Database ---
# Absolute path recommended on the VPS so every process opens the same file.
# Default (relative) resolves to <repo-root>/db/fertigation.db.
DB_PATH=db/fertigation.db

# --- agrihub.id + Telegram ---
# These are primarily stored in the `settings` table (editable from the UI).
# Values here are used by the seed script to pre-fill settings on first run.
AGRIHUB_BASE_URL=
AGRIHUB_WEATHER_APIKEY=
AGRIHUB_SOIL_APIKEY=
TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=
TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID=

content.content: File created successfully at: D:\Project\smartagri\kode\smart fertigasion\.env.example (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)

input.content:
# AgriHub Fertigation System

Sistem fertigasi sprinkler otomatis berbasis ET0 + fuzzy logic, di-deploy di VPS Ubuntu.

> ⚠️ README ini akan dilengkapi penuh di milestone terakhir (M10). Saat ini berisi ringkasan
> arsitektur saja.

## Komponen

- **control-app/** — Next.js: UI setting, REST API kontrol eWeLink, DB SQLite, scheduler internal.
- **brain/** — Python: ambil sensor agrihub.id → fuzzy → durasi → POST `/api/run`.
- **watchdog/** — Python (cron tiap menit): jaring pengaman (matikan valve kadaluarsa, safety cutoff, verifikasi, notif).
- **db/** — skema SQLite (WAL mode).
- **deploy/** — Nginx, PM2/systemd, crontab.

## Keamanan

Semua kredensial hanya di `.env` (root). Copy dari `.env.example`. `EWELINK_DRY_RUN=1` (default)
membuat sistem TIDAK pernah memicu relay fisik sampai kamu set `0`.

content.content: File created successfully at: D:\Project\smartagri\kode\smart fertigasion\README.md (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)
